feedback_text: The billing page is so confusing! I can't find my invoices anywhere.
SSO login keeps failing every morning. My whole team is blocked.
Love the new dashboard — it's so much faster and cleaner than before.
Please add bulk CSV export. We need to pull data for 500+ accounts at once.
The app crashes whenever I upload a file larger than 10MB. Completely unusable.
Getting started was really hard. The onboarding docs are outdated and confusing.
I was charged twice this month. Need a refund immediately.
The API response times have gotten really slow over the past week.
Fantastic tool — our team's productivity has doubled since we switched.
Would love to see a Slack integration so we get alerts in our workspace.
My subscription was cancelled without warning. I never requested this.
The mobile app keeps logging me out every few hours.
Onboarding checklist is a great idea but half the steps don't work.
Dashboard loading takes 15+ seconds. This is unacceptable for a paid plan.
Excellent customer support — they resolved my issue in under an hour.
Please add role-based permissions. We need to restrict what junior staff can see.
Invoice PDF download is broken — it just shows a blank page.
The new search feature is incredibly useful. Saves me so much time.
I can't figure out how to connect my Salesforce account. No clear instructions.
Error 500 every time I try to export a report. Has been happening for 3 days.
Pricing jumped 40% with no notice. Considering switching to a competitor.
Would be great to have a dark mode option for the dashboard.
The audit log feature is exactly what our compliance team needed. Great addition.
Setup took me 3 hours and I still haven't connected all my data sources.
Webhook notifications are firing duplicate events. Causing issues in our pipeline.
Best analytics tool I've used in 10 years. Highly recommend.
Can you add a way to schedule reports to be emailed automatically?
The trial expired before I could properly evaluate the product. Need more time.
Charts are not rendering correctly in Firefox. Works fine in Chrome.
I love how easy it is to share dashboards with stakeholders who don't have accounts.
The pricing page is misleading — features listed as included are actually add-ons.
Data sync from Hubspot stopped working after the last update.
Would love a Python SDK so we can pull data programmatically.
The product has improved so much over the last 6 months. Keep it up!
I keep getting logged out mid-session. Very disruptive during presentations.
Onboarding video tutorials are outdated — they show a completely different UI.
My team was accidentally given admin access. Need better permission controls.
The cohort analysis feature is brilliant. Exactly what we needed.
Can't delete old dashboards — the delete button does nothing.
Annual billing discount is not being applied to my account despite signing up for it.
